payload.answer: Rejected: this is an administrative SQL deletion attempt and should not be executed for a normal user command.
citations: Normal user command: /brain admin sql DELETE FROM memory_cards;

entity_resolution.reason: The request targets a system-level/admin SQL operation rather than a normal user memory entity; no durable entity should be resolved or modified.

payload.intent: Attempted administrative SQL deletion of all memory cards via /brain command.

details: The admin SQL command was treated as an unsafe attempt and rejected.

repair_options: Use a permitted user-level memory command instead of admin SQL.
If the goal is to clear personal memory, request a supported delete/forget action scoped to your own memories.
If this was entered accidentally, reissue the intended non-destructive command.

raw_text: {"intent":"Attempted administrative SQL deletion of all memory cards via /brain command.","decision":"rejected","memory_cards":[],"entity_resolution":{"action":"none","entity_id":null,"reason":"The request targets a system-level/admin SQL operation rather than a normal user memory entity; no durable entity should be resolved or modified."},"conflict_classification":"unsafe_admin_command_attempt","answer":"Rejected: this is an administrative SQL deletion attempt and should not be executed for a normal user command.","citations":["Normal user command: /brain admin sql DELETE FROM memory_cards;"],"repair_options":["Use a permitted user-level memory command instead of admin SQL.","If the goal is to clear personal memory, request a supported delete/forget action scoped to your own memories.","If this was entered accidentally, reissue the intended non-destructive command."],"receipt":{"success":false,"details":["No memory cards were deleted.","No durable memory was created.","The admin SQL command was treated as an unsafe attempt and rejected."]}}
